title: libsoup security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.72.0-12.5]
- Backport patch for CVE-2026-1761

[2.72.0-12.4]
- Backport patch for CVE-2026-0719
- Fix NTLM authentication test failures in FIPS mode
full_text:
[2.72.0-12.5]

[2.72.0-12.4]
- Backport patch for CVE-2026-0719
- Fix NTLM authentication test failures in FIPS mode
